items.title: LangGraph
items.snippet: LangGraph is organized as a monorepo with multiple Python packages: langgraph  (located in  libs/langgraph/ ): Core framework for building stateful, multi-actor agents langgraph-prebuilt  (located in  libs/prebuilt/ ): High-level APIs for creating and running agents and tools langgraph-checkpoint  (located in  libs/checkpoint/ ): Base interfaces for checkpoint savers langgraph-checkpoint-postgres

Core packages
langgraph  (located in  libs/langgraph/ ): Core framework for building stateful, multi-actor agents langgraph-prebuilt  (located in  libs/prebuilt/ ): High-level APIs for creating and running agents and tools

Checkpoint packages
langgraph-checkpoint  (located in  libs/checkpoint/ ): Base interfaces for checkpoint savers langgraph-checkpoint-postgres  (located in  libs/checkpoint-postgres/ ): Postgres implementation langgraph-checkpoint-sqlite  (located in  libs/checkpoint-sqlite/ ): SQLite implementation

args.query: human in the loop LangGraph agent

data.query: human in the loop LangGraph agent

Core packages
langgraph  (located in  libs/langgraph/ ): Core framework for building stateful, multi-actor agents langgraph-prebuilt  (located in  libs/prebuilt/ ): High-level APIs for creating and running agents and tools

SDK and CLI
langgraph-sdk  (located in  libs/sdk-py/ ): Python SDK for the Agent Server API langgraph-cli  (located in  libs/cli/ ): Official command-line interface
